settings.heading: Choose how you want to experience Seppeltsfield.
settings.body: Book wine tastings, estate tours, dining, accommodation and private events across one of the Barossa's most remarkable destinations.
settings.note_heading: One booking hub for the estate.
settings.note_body: This page brings together transactional booking pathways while the Visit page remains the inspiration and planning destination.

settings.heading: Five ways to book Seppeltsfield.
settings.body: Each card directs guests to the appropriate booking flow, partner platform or enquiry form.

settings.title: Choose a date and time
settings.body: Live availability and pricing are provided by Rezdy.

settings.title: Select your experience
settings.body: Wine tastings, cellar experiences and estate tours can all live within the embedded catalogue.

settings.title: Complete your booking securely
settings.body: Payment, confirmation and booking management remain within the external provider.

settings.heading: Book directly through Rezdy.
settings.body: The existing third-party booking system can remain embedded, but the surrounding page should feel fully integrated with the Seppeltsfield design system.

settings.title: Restaurant reservations
settings.body: Book FINO or find restaurant details and opening hours.

settings.title: Accommodation bookings
settings.body: Explore The Lodge and available stay packages.

settings.title: Weddings and private events
settings.body: Start an enquiry for weddings, celebrations and corporate functions.

settings.title: Booking support
settings.body: Contact the team if you need help choosing or arranging an experience.

settings.heading: Not every experience belongs in one iframe.
settings.body: Restaurant reservations, accommodation and private events may require different booking systems or enquiry flows. Keeping these clearly separated prevents confusion.

settings.heading: A remarkable setting for meaningful occasions.
settings.body: Private events require more than a simple booking widget. This section introduces the opportunity and leads into a dedicated enquiry template with venue options, catering, galleries and downloadable information.

settings.question: How do I book a wine tasting or tour?
settings.answer: Select your preferred experience, date and time through the Rezdy booking catalogue above.

settings.question: Can I book for a large group?
settings.answer: Large groups may require a direct enquiry so the team can confirm availability and recommend the most suitable experience.

settings.question: Where do I book FINO?
settings.answer: Restaurant bookings should route to the dedicated FINO page or its external reservation platform.

settings.question: Can I change or cancel a booking?
settings.answer: Booking amendments and cancellation terms are managed according to the conditions provided during checkout by the relevant booking platform.

settings.heading: Let the team help plan your experience.
settings.body: Contact Seppeltsfield for group bookings, accessibility questions, private experiences or help choosing the right visit.
